pricing.title: Buy actions
pricing.subtitle: Pay only for what you use. No subscriptions, no surprises. Actions never expire.
pricing.paymentSecureTest: Secure payment via Stripe. Test mode — use card 4242 4242 4242 4242.

faq.title: What is an AI action?
faq.item1: 1 action = one request to your AI chef.
faq.item4: Catalog and basic tools are free.

success.title: Payment successful!
success.subtitle: Your actions are being credited to your account.
success.note: Stripe is confirming the payment with our server. This usually takes a few seconds — your new balance will appear in the chat shortly.

cancel.title: Checkout cancelled
cancel.subtitle: No charge was made. You can try again any time.
